text: We have had such great experiences at Integrative Dentistry. Dr. Cao, Lee and Brenda are superstars. They always make us feel comfortable are gentle, kind and explain everything so you are confident in your care. Love their holistic approach too- it’s so important. I truly think this is the best dentist office in Seattle!
author: Sheila A.

text: i am so glad to be with Integrative Dentistry. My 'root canal gone bad' tooth was so well handled by this amazing team. First, Dr Birrer did an amazing effort to diagnose and plan the path forward. Dr Daneals took care of the needs to set my body up for the removal and recovery. Dr Do and his assistant were fabulous for the actual removal of the tooth and infected area. Blessed to have such an amazing team supporting me and my health.
author: Bert D.

text: Dr. Birrer and the team here are the only dentists I trust to be honest and up to date on the best in integrative dentistry care. Lee and Lydia are friendly and tip top hygienists for dental cleanings. As a physician myself, I seek out excellent care and definitely receive it here. I highly recommend. ☀️
author: Noel H.

text: I saw Morgan today for my cleaning and she is so sweet and warm and welcoming. Not to mention, she has the most gentle touch. I have some sensitivity and it’s not unusual for me to get a little zing now and then when I go in for my routine cleaning—something I assumed was unavoidable. I had not a moment of discomfort with Morgan! She paid attention to my areas of sensitivity with extra care. Assistant Jenn took some pictures and was equally kind and gentle. Great team!
author: Erinn L.

text: I have been a patient of Dr. Birrer for over 10 years and I can say without hesitation that he is the best dentist I have ever had. He is knowledgeable, skilled, and truly cares about his patients. He takes the time to explain procedures and answer any questions I have, which makes me feel comfortable and confident in his care. The staff at his office are also wonderful - they are friendly, professional, and always make me feel welcome. I highly recommend Dr. Birrer to anyone looking for a great dentist.
author: Marie C.

text: I have been a patient of Dr. Birrer for over 10 years and I can say without hesitation that he is the best dentist I have ever had. He is knowledgeable, skilled, and truly cares about his patients. He takes the time to explain procedures and answer any questions I have, which makes me feel comfortable and confident in his care. author: Maggie F.

text: Lydia is the best! She is thorough, knowledgable and caring. No frills, no extras, just great dentistry. I am so glad I found this dental office ❤️💕🥰🦷🪥
author: Marsha N.

text: Amazing dentistry! Goldie was so thorough💛grateful for this practice and the care of Dr Birrer.
author: Ciela W.

text: I appreciate the professionalism, efficiency and leading edge technology used by Dr. Birrer, my hygienist Morgan, and assistant Lee,, and all the staff at Integretive Dentistry. I also appreciate the cleanliness of all areas of the office. I highly recommend them!
author: Andrea C.

text: Friends, this clinic has amazed me! The staff is professional, the prices are reasonable, and the customer service is so unique that I'll try to sum it up this way: It's as if you're asking your closest friend for their opinion, not someone selling services, who cares about you first and foremost, not just making money.
author: Roman M.
